scripts.dev: npm run build && wrangler dev --env local
scripts.preview: npm run build && wrangler dev --env local
scripts.preview:develop: npm run build && wrangler dev --env develop
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler deploy --env prod
scripts.deploy:develop: npm run build && wrangler deploy --env develop
scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 migrations apply dpflab-local --local --env local
scripts.db:migrate:remote: wrangler d1 migrations apply dpflab --remote --env prod
scripts.db:migrate:remote:develop: wrangler d1 migrations apply dpflab-develop --remote --env develop
